_meta.source_note: 1387–1396: levels widely republished as CBI end-of–Persian-year broad liquidity (نقدینگی) in «هزار میلیارد ریال». 1397: implied from CBI-communicated ≈23% YoY to end 96 on end 95. 1398–1403: rounded continuation from CBI/press and official bulletins; same scale only YoY matters for the M2 line. Reconcile manually if more authoritative annual CBI table is published.
_meta.gregorian_yoy_map: YoY from L(s) vs L(s−1) to calendar label year G=621+s (Esfand-ended Persian year, standard domestic reporting).
_meta.maintenance: static JSON; not fetched in cron. Update when new CBI year-end table rows are available.
